title: Hellminers
description: Help defend Democracy in Minecraft. Join the Hellminers today!
body:
A Helldivers 2 inspired modpack. Help defend humanity and destroy the enemies of democracy with a large variety of explosives and weaponry. The enemies of freedom  are constantly on the attack will you help defend Super Minecraft and stand up for Democracy. Join the Hellminers!

Inclused a variety of **Helldivers** and **Tech/Weaponry** themed mods. These include:

- Ballistix
- Mekanism
- Thermal Mods
- Create
- Helldivers: Crafted Democracy

**and more!**

Also includes a dedicated multiplayer server to help defend **Democracy** with others!

This is a fanmade project and is not affiliated with Helldivers, Arrowhead Game Studios or PlayStation.
